title: 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
description: <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/images/Road_to_GML_Master-Header.max-600x600.format-webp.webp">Three new agentic safety and policy features integrated into Ads Advisor will help protect and streamline your Google Ads account.
